base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of town_crescent_lake — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Crescent Lake — Circle of Sages town. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Crescent Lake — Circle of Sages town
